data.name: Dashboard.Subtitle
data.value: Local diagnostics and transparent optimization for FiveM.

data.name: Dashboard.ReadinessExplanation
data.value: Capacity signal based on available memory, logical processors, free disk space, detected graphics adapter, cache state and FiveM edition. It is not an FPS benchmark or a performance promise.

data.name: Profiles.RecommendedHint
data.value: Balanced is recommended for most PCs.

data.name: Profiles.Light.Description
data.value: Gentle adjustments with reductions limited to expensive visual effects.

data.name: Profiles.Balanced.Description
data.value: A balance of image quality, power, capture and responsiveness.

data.name: Profiles.Aggressive.Description
data.value: Reduces expensive effects and settings for limited PCs.

data.name: Optimizer.Subtitle
data.value: Deterministic plan: the helper accepts only known built-in actions.

data.name: History.Subtitle
data.value: Every run records actions, results and the state required for rollback.

data.name: Settings.Subtitle
data.value: Customize the app without weakening the selected optimization profile.

data.name: Settings.Language.Description
data.value: Detected from Windows on first launch. You can change it at any time.

data.name: Settings.Appearance.Description
data.value: Choose a theme or automatically follow Windows.

data.name: Settings.CloseBehavior.Tray
data.value: Keep running in the notification area

data.name: Settings.StartWithWindows.Description
data.value: Open FiveMCleaner after you sign in.

data.name: Safety.Limits.Description
data.value: FiveMCleaner never disables Defender, Firewall, UAC, Windows Update, the page file or critical services; it does not use BCDEdit/HPET, injection, hooks or Realtime priority.

data.name: Safety.EnhancedBlocked
data.value: FiveM Enhanced: blocked in this version until its official layout has been tested.

data.name: About.License
data.value: Source code under the MIT license. Independent project, not affiliated with Cfx.re, Rockstar Games or Microsoft.

data.name: BugReport.Intro
data.value: Clear steps help us reproduce and fix the issue faster.

data.name: BugReport.Privacy
data.value: We do not ask for a name or email. The delivery service may log the IP address and technical connection data for security. Remove personal information from the image before sending.

data.name: BugReport.Summary.Example
data.value: Example: the Balanced profile stopped at the power step

data.name: BugReport.Description.Help
data.value: Explain what you did, what appeared and what should have happened.

data.name: BugReport.Attachment.Help
data.value: PNG or JPG, up to 8 MB. Metadata will be removed.

data.name: BugReport.Technical.Help
data.value: App version, Windows, detected edition and profile only. No name, user, hostname, paths or server.

data.name: BugReport.Validation.Summary
data.value: The summary must be between 5 and 120 characters.

data.name: BugReport.Validation.Description
data.value: The description must be between 20 and 8,000 characters.

data.name: Status.Ready.Detail
data.value: Review the plan and choose Run plan when you are ready.

data.name: Status.LocalOnly
data.value: Diagnostics run locally and do not send data.

data.name: Status.SafeCancellation.Detail
data.value: Cancellation occurred between actions. Incomplete changes were rolled back.

data.name: Status.CancellationPending
data.value: The current step will finish before cancellation.

data.name: Plan.Elevation.OnePrompt
data.value: Windows will display a single UAC prompt.

data.name: Plan.Safety.Mixed
data.value: Permanent cleanups are identified in the plan. Settings have rollback.

data.name: Plan.Safety.Reversible
data.value: Every change in this plan can be undone.

data.name: Plan.NoAdditionalWarnings
data.value: No additional warnings for this plan.

data.name: Diagnosis.CouldNotScanAgain
data.value: Could not scan again right now

data.name: Diagnosis.GtaVOpen
data.value: GTA V OPEN • CLOSE TO OPTIMIZE

data.name: Diagnosis.CloseGtaVSafely
data.value: Close GTA V to optimize safely

data.name: Diagnosis.LegacyReady
data.value: Diagnostics found the known Legacy layout and prepared compatible actions.

data.name: Diagnosis.EnhancedUnsupported
data.value: The Enhanced edition uses a new launcher and configurable cache. This version will not apply Legacy rules to it.

data.name: Diagnosis.InstallLegacy
data.value: Select a valid Legacy installation or install FiveM to enable optimization.

data.name: History.Empty.Summary
data.value: Your first run will appear here

data.name: Dialog.Rollback.Message
data.value: Restore the settings saved by this run? Cache and temporary file cleanup cannot be recovered.

data.name: Dialog.CancelRunning.Message
data.value: An optimization is in progress. Request safe cancellation after the current step?

data.name: BugReport.Attachment.DialogTitle
data.value: Select an image of the issue

data.name: BugReport.Attachment.Sanitized
data.value: The image was re-encoded without EXIF data or its original file name.

data.name: BugReport.Copy.Success
data.value: Report copied. The image is not included in the text copy.

data.name: BugReport.Send.Cancelled
data.value: Sending cancelled. The service may have received the report; we do not retry automatically.

data.name: Runtime.SimulationSafe
data.value: Safe mode: no setting, file or registry value will be changed.

data.name: Runtime.SimulationNoWrites
data.value: Confirming that demonstration mode did not write data to the system.

data.name: Runtime.NoChangesApplied
data.value: No changes were applied to the computer.

data.name: Runtime.ValidatingPlanDetail
data.value: Checking version, edition and allowed actions.

data.name: Runtime.WindowsConfirmationDetail
data.value: The limited broker requests UAC only for the allowlisted power plan.

data.name: Runtime.PlanCompletedDetail
data.value: Changes verified and recorded for rollback.

data.name: Runtime.RestoreCompletedDetail
data.value: Rollback respected newer changes and did not attempt to recover permanent cleanups.

data.name: Tray.Message
data.value: Double-click the tray icon to return.

data.name: Log.SettingsSaveFailed
data.value: Could not save settings right now.

data.name: Settings.CloseBehavior.Description
data.value: Choose whether clicking X exits completely or keeps FiveMCleaner available from the notification area.

data.name: Dialog.FatalError.Message
data.value: FiveMCleaner encountered an unexpected error. No new change will be applied.\n\n{0}

data.name: BugReport.Attachment.Invalid
data.value: Select a valid PNG or JPEG image up to 8 MB.

data.name: BugReport.Send.ImageTooLarge
data.value: The image exceeded the delivery service limit.

data.name: BugReport.Send.RateLimited
data.value: The service received too many reports. Wait a few minutes and try again.

data.name: BugReport.Send.ActivationRequired
data.value: The report channel is awaiting activation by the developer. Use Copy report in the meantime.

data.name: BugReport.Send.NotConfirmed
data.value: The delivery service did not confirm receipt. Copy the report and try again later.

data.name: BugReport.Send.UnexpectedResponse
data.value: The service returned an unexpected response. Copy the report and try again later.

data.name: BugReport.Send.Accepted
data.value: The delivery service received the report.

data.name: Streaming.RunningDetail
data.value: FiveMCleaner will preserve the app and never infer that you are live.

data.name: Streaming.InstalledDetail
data.value: The plan does not alter scenes, accounts or recording files.

data.name: Streaming.SafeDetail
data.value: Profiles do not close OBS, Streamlabs or TikTok LIVE Studio.

data.name: Streaming.PartialDetail
data.value: Some locations could not be read; conservative rules remain active.

data.name: Streaming.Readiness.Protected.Detail
data.value: A streaming app is open. FiveMCleaner preserves it; confirm your broadcast state before optimizing.

data.name: Streaming.Readiness.Attention.Title
data.value: Run a test before going live

data.name: Streaming.Readiness.Attention.Detail
data.value: The diagnosis shows resource pressure or an open game session. Use a private scene to validate stability.

data.name: Streaming.Readiness.Ready.Detail
data.value: Your streaming software was detected. The plan preserves its settings and files.

data.name: Streaming.Readiness.Partial.Detail
data.value: Part of the local check did not finish. No streaming setting will be changed.

data.name: Streaming.Readiness.NotDetected.Detail
data.value: When you use OBS, Streamlabs or TikTok LIVE Studio, this panel helps review the PC without touching your scenes.

data.name: Streaming.Check.Software.Protected.DetailWithNames
data.value: {0} is running. This does not confirm that a broadcast is live.

data.name: Streaming.Check.Software.Partial.Detail
data.value: The complete local scan of streaming software could not finish.

data.name: Streaming.Check.Software.Partial.DetailWithNames
data.value: {0} was detected; part of the local scan was unavailable.

data.name: Streaming.Check.Software.Detected.DetailWithNames
data.value: {0} was detected. Scenes, profiles and recordings remain untouched.

data.name: Streaming.Check.Software.NotDetected.Detail
data.value: No recognized application was found in this local scan.

data.name: Streaming.Check.Resources.Ready.Detail
data.value: Memory is available and this diagnosis has low pressure.

data.name: Streaming.Check.Resources.Attention.Detail
data.value: Prioritize an encoder test and reduce load before starting a broadcast.

data.name: Streaming.Check.Resources.Review.Detail
data.value: Headroom appears moderate. Test the scene and monitor dropped frames on the platform.

data.name: Streaming.Check.GameSession.Open.Detail
data.value: Close FiveM and GTA V before applying optimizations that may edit settings.

data.name: Streaming.Check.GameSession.Closed.Detail
data.value: The PC is in a safe state to plan optimizations before playing or broadcasting.

data.name: Actions.safety.fivem-stopped.verify.Description
data.value: Confirms that FiveM processes are closed before any cache or graphics change.

data.name: Actions.safety.gtav-stopped.verify.Description
data.value: Confirms that GTA V Legacy is closed before its settings.xml is changed.

data.name: Actions.storage.user-temporary-files.clean.Description
data.value: Removes only user temporary files older than the retention period selected by the profile.

data.name: Actions.fivem.legacy.crash-dumps.prune.Description
data.value: Removes old FiveM Legacy dumps and logs while preserving recent diagnostics.

data.name: Actions.fivem.legacy.server-cache.repair.Description
data.value: Removes only regenerable FiveM Legacy server-content caches when a repair is needed.

data.name: Actions.windows.gaming.game-mode.enable.Description
data.value: Enables the Windows gaming feature that prioritizes resources while games are running.

data.name: Actions.windows.gaming.high-performance-gpu.prefer.Description
data.value: Sets the Windows graphics preference for detected FiveM Legacy launchers and renderers.

data.name: Actions.windows.gaming.background-capture.disable.Description
data.value: Disables continuous Windows background recording without removing Game Bar.

data.name: Actions.windows.power.performance-session.enable.Description
data.value: Uses a performance power plan while plugged in and records the previous state for rollback.

data.name: Actions.fivem.legacy.graphics.light.apply.Description
data.value: Disables only the most expensive antialiasing in the existing FiveM file, with a backup.

data.name: Actions.fivem.legacy.graphics.balanced.apply.Description
data.value: Adjusts only existing FiveM Legacy graphics options and creates a backup before writing.

data.name: Actions.fivem.legacy.graphics.aggressive.apply.Description
data.value: Reduces the most expensive FiveM Legacy graphics options and creates a backup first.

data.name: Actions.gtav.legacy.graphics.light.apply.Description
data.value: Finds GTA V Legacy settings.xml, reduces only expensive existing options and creates a backup.

data.name: Actions.gtav.legacy.graphics.balanced.apply.Description
data.value: Applies balanced limits only to existing GTA V Legacy settings.xml options, with a backup.

data.name: Actions.gtav.legacy.graphics.aggressive.apply.Description
data.value: Reduces expensive GTA V Legacy graphics options without changing resolution, display mode or adapter.

data.name: Actions.windows.appearance.visual-effects.reduce.Description
data.value: Reduces animations and transparency while preserving readability and font smoothing.

data.name: Runtime.ConfirmRestoreDetail
data.value: The previous power plan requires the elevated broker to be restored.

data.name: Runtime.AdminRestorePendingDetail
data.value: Confirm UAC from History when you want to complete the rollback.

data.name: Plan.Notice.NoLegacy
data.value: No compatible FiveM Legacy installation was detected.

data.name: Plan.Notice.EnhancedUnsupported
data.value: FiveM Enhanced is not supported yet. No Legacy action will run on that edition.

data.name: Plan.Notice.DiagnosticsRetention
data.value: Diagnostics older than {0} days will be permanently removed.

data.name: Plan.Notice.ServerCacheRepair
data.value: Server caches will be rebuilt and the first load may be slower; cleaning server-cache-priv can also make older Rockstar Editor clips unavailable.

data.name: Plan.Notice.AcPower
data.value: The performance power mode is applied only while the computer is plugged in.

data.name: Plan.Notice.AggressiveVisual
data.value: The Aggressive profile prioritizes FPS and responsiveness over visual quality.

data.name: Results.FiveMStopped
data.value: FiveM is closed; it is safe to continue.

data.name: Results.GtaVStopped
data.value: GTA V is closed; it is safe to continue.

data.name: Results.NoAllowlistedFiles
data.value: No allowlisted file matched the cleanup criteria.

data.name: Results.RegistryNoChange
data.value: No compatible value needed to be changed.

data.name: Results.PowerOnBattery
data.value: The high-performance mode was not enabled because the computer is on battery power.

data.name: Results.PowerUnsupported
data.value: This computer does not expose a compatible high-performance power plan.

data.name: Results.PowerAlreadyActive
data.value: The high-performance power plan was already active.

data.name: Results.PowerActivated
data.value: The high-performance power plan was activated; the previous state was saved for rollback.

data.name: Results.GraphicsGtaNotConfirmed
data.value: The GTA V Legacy installation was not confirmed; settings.xml will not be changed.

data.name: Results.GraphicsFiveMSettingsMissing
data.value: gta5_settings.xml does not exist yet; open FiveM once before applying the preset.

data.name: Results.GraphicsGtaSettingsMissing
data.value: settings.xml does not exist yet; open GTA V Legacy once before applying the preset.

data.name: Results.GraphicsAlreadyApplied
data.value: The allowlisted graphics settings already matched the requested preset.

data.name: Results.GraphicsUpdated
data.value: A backup was created and {0} graphics option(s) were updated.

data.name: Results.VisualEffectsAlreadyApplied
data.value: Windows visual effects already matched the requested state.

data.name: Results.VisualEffectsUpdated
data.value: Windows visual effects were updated through the official API.

data.name: Update.Available.Detail
data.value: Official installer found ({0}). Its size and GitHub SHA-256 will be verified before it can open.

data.name: Update.Downloading.Detail
data.value: {0:0}% downloaded • the installer will not run automatically

data.name: Update.Ready.Detail
data.value: SHA-256 verified. Windows will ask before the installer opens.

data.name: Dialog.UpdateInstall.Message
data.value: Open the verified FiveMCleaner {0} installer now? The app will close so the update can replace its files.

data.name: Dialog.UpdateInstall.Failed
data.value: Windows could not open the verified installer: {0}

data.name: Log.UpdateAvailable
data.value: Update {0} is available from the official GitHub release.

data.name: Log.UpdateVerified
data.value: Update downloaded and verified with SHA-256.

data.name: Profiles.Impact.Light.High
data.value: Limited potential for this PC • FPS not measured

data.name: Profiles.Impact.Aggressive.Low
data.value: Low potential • strong visual reduction • FPS not measured

data.name: Profiles.Impact.Aggressive.Moderate
data.value: High potential • strong visual reduction • FPS not measured

data.name: Profiles.Impact.Aggressive.High
data.value: Highest potential • strong visual reduction • FPS not measured

data.name: Demo.Notice
data.value: Balanced configuration; the recommended profile preserves quality and prioritizes consistency.

data.name: Diagnosis.MemoryUnavailable
data.value: Windows did not return physical memory status.

data.name: Runtime.DemoHistoryDisabled
data.value: Demonstration mode does not access the computer's real history.

data.name: Runtime.LocalChangesReverted
data.value: Local changes were not confirmed and were rolled back.

data.name: Runtime.AdminConfirmationCancelled
data.value: Administrative confirmation was cancelled before it began.

data.name: Runtime.BrokerResultUnconfirmed
data.value: The administrative component did not confirm its result: {0}

data.name: Runtime.UacCancelledRestored
data.value: UAC was cancelled. Reversible settings were restored; completed cleanups remain recorded.

data.name: Runtime.RollbackJournalError
data.value: The journal preserved a rollback error for diagnostics.

data.name: Runtime.RollbackConflict
data.value: Local rollback found a conflict and preserved the user's newer state.

data.name: Runtime.Interrupted.RolledBack
data.value: {0} Reversible local settings were restored; confirmed cleanups remain in History.

data.name: Runtime.Interrupted.AdminPending
data.value: {0} History shows an administrative restoration pending; use Undo to complete it with UAC.

data.name: Runtime.Interrupted.RollbackFailed
data.value: {0} Local rollback found a conflict and preserved the journal for diagnostics.

data.name: Runtime.Interrupted.Unconfirmed
data.value: {0} The final state could not be confirmed; inspect History before trying again.

data.name: Runtime.Interrupted.CheckHistory
data.value: {0} Check local History to confirm the transaction's final state.

data.name: BugReport.Service.ImageTooLarge
data.value: The image exceeded the delivery service limit.

data.name: BugReport.Service.RateLimited
data.value: The service received too many reports. Wait a few minutes and try again.

data.name: BugReport.Service.ActivationRequired
data.value: The report channel is awaiting developer activation. Copy the report in the meantime.

data.name: BugReport.Service.Unconfirmed
data.value: The delivery service did not confirm receipt. Copy the report and try again later.

data.name: BugReport.Service.UnexpectedResponse
data.value: The service returned an unexpected response. Copy the report and try again later.

data.name: BugReport.Service.Accepted
data.value: Report accepted by the delivery service.
